name: Freddy Fazbear

possessedBy.source: The Fourth Closet (graphic novel); supported by the Survival Logbook

status.source: Five Nights at Freddy's 3 (the classic animatronics were scrapped; parts salvaged for Fazbear's Fright)

notes: Base identity for variants such as Withered Freddy, Toy Freddy, Nightmare Freddy and Glamrock Freddy.
The movie version is a separate character entry linked via counterparts.

name: Golden Freddy

possessedBy.source: Survival Logbook (faded text); name spelling from The Fourth Closet (graphic novel)

status.source: Ultimate Custom Night is popularly theorized to depict its soul tormenting William Afton

notes: Appears as a hallucination-like entity rather than a physical animatronic in FNAF 1.
Identified in-universe as a retired 'golden Freddy suit' (springlock era); closely tied to the Fredbear identity, which should be its own entry.
Classified as a Fredbear variant: identified in-universe as the retired golden springlock suit.

name: Toy Freddy
notes: In Ultimate Custom Night he is found playing video games in Parts/Service.

name: Withered Freddy

possessedBy.source: Same soul as classic Freddy; The Fourth Closet (graphic novel)

notes: Verify whether the Help Wanted FNAF 2 levels justify adding fnaf-hw.

name: Shadow Freddy

status.source: Widely theorized to be a shadow/spirit entity rather than a physical animatronic

notes: Rare appearance in FNAF 2's Parts/Service; in the FNAF 3 minigames it lures the classic animatronics to be dismantled.

status.source: Five Nights at Freddy's 3 (phantoms cause no physical harm, only ventilation errors)

name: Fredbear
notes: Springlock hybrid suit from Fredbear's Family Diner; performed alongside Spring Bonnie.
Chronologically the first mascot in-universe; variantOf follows design lineage, not in-universe chronology.
Responsible for the Bite of '83 in the FNAF 4 minigames.
Appears in Ultimate Custom Night as a secret character summoned via Dee Dee.

name: Nightmare Freddy
notes: Accompanied by three miniature Freddies known as Freddles.

name: Nightmare Fredbear
notes: Replaces all other nightmares on Night 5 of FNAF 4.

name: Nightmare
notes: Shadow counterpart of Nightmare Fredbear, active from Night 7 (Nightmare mode).
Verify whether his Ultimate Custom Night appearance warrants adding fnaf-ucn.

name: Funtime Freddy

status.source: Sister Location ending and Freddy Fazbear's Pizzeria Simulator

notes: Built by Circus Baby's Entertainment and Rental with child-capture capabilities; carries the Bon-Bon hand puppet.
Merged with the other Funtimes to form Ennard; see ennard and molten-freddy.

name: Molten Freddy

possessedBy.value: Funtime animatronics' amalgam (Ennard minus Circus Baby)
possessedBy.source: Freddy Fazbear's Pizzeria Simulator (voiced by Funtime Freddy's dominant personality)

status.source: Burned in the Freddy Fazbear's Pizzeria Simulator fire

notes: Cross-family variant: it is Ennard's wire mass after Circus Baby's ejection, wearing a Funtime Freddy-like mask.
Classified under the Freddy family by its dominant personality; see ennard for the amalgam's origin.

status.source: Burned in the Freddy Fazbear's Pizzeria Simulator fire

name: Helpy
notes: Miniature Funtime Freddy lookalike serving as Fazbear Entertainment's mascot/assistant.
Classifying Helpy as a Funtime Freddy variant is an editorial decision — he is a distinct character in-universe.
Verify whether his Ultimate Custom Night and Help Wanted 2 cameos warrant adding those ids.

name: Glamrock Freddy

status.source: Five Nights at Freddy's: Security Breach

notes: First heroic protagonist animatronic in the series; allies with Gregory against the Pizzaplex threats.
Verify the extent of his RUIN appearance (head used in the Mimic's ending sequence) on the wiki.

name: Dreadbear
notes: Frankenstein's-monster-like bear introduced as the Curse of Dreadbear DLC's flagship character.

name: Freddy Frostbear
notes: Christmas 2019 event skin in Special Delivery; the game's first skin.

name: Shamrock Freddy
notes: St. Patrick's Day 2020 event skin in Special Delivery.

name: Firework Freddy
notes: Independence Day 2020 event skin in Special Delivery. Verify exact name and event on the wiki.

name: Freddy Fazbear (Novel Trilogy)
notes: In the novel continuity, the golden Freddy suit is tied to Michael Brooks — see michael-brooks.
Verify appearances in The Fourth Closet before publishing.

name: Freddy Fazbear (Movie)

possessedBy.value: One of the five missing children

notes: Suit performed by a physical animatronic built by Jim Henson's Creature Shop.
Verify the child's name for the movie continuity before publishing.
